## Meeting Purpose

[Kick-off meeting for Lane Sync client operations, discussing ongoing projects, priorities, and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/eESqWuv1dhRNNeUpzDv54-pVs58RoduG?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New agentic workflows for drafting, research, and internal linking are being implemented and tested across clients](https://fathom.video/share/eESqWuv1dhRNNeUpzDv54-pVs58RoduG?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Refresh workflows need improvement; testing underway with Smith, Diligent, and potentially others](https://fathom.video/share/eESqWuv1dhRNNeUpzDv54-pVs58RoduG?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Integration challenges persist with platforms like Framer, WordPress, and Medium; client cooperation needed](https://fathom.video/share/eESqWuv1dhRNNeUpzDv54-pVs58RoduG?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [On-call rotation and task assignment processes to be refined for better clarity and efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/eESqWuv1dhRNNeUpzDv54-pVs58RoduG?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)

## Topics

### Workflow Improvements and Testing

  - [Daniel developed new agentic workflows for drafting, research, and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/eESqWuv1dhRNNeUpzDv54-pVs58RoduG?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Testing underway with clients like Fathom, Monograph, Biologica, and Metronome](https://fathom.video/share/eESqWuv1dhRNNeUpzDv54-pVs58RoduG?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Refresh workflows being tested with Smith and Diligent; potential for broader implementation](https://fathom.video/share/eESqWuv1dhRNNeUpzDv54-pVs58RoduG?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Concerns about artifact quality potentially causing agents to get stuck in loops](https://fathom.video/share/eESqWuv1dhRNNeUpzDv54-pVs58RoduG?tab=summary&timestamp=2069.0)

### Integration Challenges

  - [Framer lacks API, complicating integration; CSV import being explored as a workaround](https://fathom.video/share/eESqWuv1dhRNNeUpzDv54-pVs58RoduG?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [WordPress integration progressing with tray.io as a proxy](https://fathom.video/share/eESqWuv1dhRNNeUpzDv54-pVs58RoduG?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Medium integration nearly complete, awaiting final confirmation](https://fathom.video/share/eESqWuv1dhRNNeUpzDv54-pVs58RoduG?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Webflow integration pending valid API key](https://fathom.video/share/eESqWuv1dhRNNeUpzDv54-pVs58RoduG?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)

### Client Updates and Priorities

  - [Metronome still in negotiation phase](https://fathom.video/share/eESqWuv1dhRNNeUpzDv54-pVs58RoduG?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Town and Engine reported as happy clients](https://fathom.video/share/eESqWuv1dhRNNeUpzDv54-pVs58RoduG?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Hypergrowth (thought leadership for G) seems fine; older ticket (241) may need review](https://fathom.video/share/eESqWuv1dhRNNeUpzDv54-pVs58RoduG?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Interwell expected to provide necessary information on Wednesday (high priority)](https://fathom.video/share/eESqWuv1dhRNNeUpzDv54-pVs58RoduG?tab=summary&timestamp=2006.0)

### Task Assignment and On-Call Rotation

  - [Discussion on whether to pre-assign tasks or allow team members to pick them up](https://fathom.video/share/eESqWuv1dhRNNeUpzDv54-pVs58RoduG?tab=summary&timestamp=2897.0)
  - [Kirkland expressed preference for upfront task assignment for planning purposes](https://fathom.video/share/eESqWuv1dhRNNeUpzDv54-pVs58RoduG?tab=summary&timestamp=3061.0)
  - [On-call rotation to be clearly communicated; Nicolas next in line](https://fathom.video/share/eESqWuv1dhRNNeUpzDv54-pVs58RoduG?tab=summary&timestamp=3162.0)
  - [Stevie to send reminders about on-call responsibilities to build team muscle memory](https://fathom.video/share/eESqWuv1dhRNNeUpzDv54-pVs58RoduG?tab=summary&timestamp=3237.0)

### OCR Tool Exploration

  - [Reducto.ai suggested as a potential tool for document processing, especially for Biologica](https://fathom.video/share/eESqWuv1dhRNNeUpzDv54-pVs58RoduG?tab=summary&timestamp=2461.0)
  - [Consideration of integrating OCR capabilities into the knowledge base for broader use](https://fathom.video/share/eESqWuv1dhRNNeUpzDv54-pVs58RoduG?tab=summary&timestamp=2526.0)
